f(i)end,function(D,x)local f=v(x)local V=function(V,y,e,k)return O(D,{V;y,e;k},x,f)end return V end,function(D,x)local f=v(x)local V=function(V)return O(D,{V},x,f)end return V end,-838273-(-838273),function(D)a[D]=a[D]-(-728992+728993)if-573196+573196==a[D]then a[D],K[D]=nil,nil end end return(s(10788052-651809,{}))(f(i))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[x(-801350+749299)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
